◎简　　介  

　　Discover what happens inside FC Barcelona, one of the most popular and successful sport clubs in the world, experience how the matches are lived inside the dressing room, enjoy the victories with the team, suffer the defeats from within, share free time with the players - Everything that has never been seen before is exposed in these series that have had an unprecedented access...
